demographics.living_situation: lives with family; says they have been pulling away from them the last couple of days

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't breathe, my chest is pounding, and every time I close my eyes I see the videos from the news playing on a loop. I haven't slept in two days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's gotten really bad in the last couple of hours — my heart won't slow down and I can't catch my breath, and I'm scared something is wrong with me.

symptom_narrative.onset: building over the last 48 hours, much worse in the last couple of hours
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding and racing, chest feels tight, breathing fast like I can't get enough air, hands shaking, can't sit still
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've felt — I feel like something bad is about to happen
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest and throat, and my whole body feels wired
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, spikes whenever I look at the news or my phone
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — I can't calm down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: watching the news videos and checking my phone makes it worse, but I can't stop
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: not sleeping at all, nightmares and images of the victims when I do close my eyes, feeling helpless and guilty, going numb and withdrawing from my family
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't sleep, can't work, can't be around people; just pacing the house

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: has been watching continuous news and social-media footage about violence in their community for the past two days and feels a strong pull to keep watching it even though it is making them feel worse

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch keeps showing my heart rate around 115
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-read wearable value during acute distress; not a clinical measurement

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing really fast, way faster than normal
